steps.title: Link damage to its source
steps.content: The sentence says critics complimented the novel despite damage connected to Soviet censors. The blank needs a phrase meaning that the damage was caused or inflicted by those censors.

steps.title: Choose the caused-by phrase
steps.content: Choice A suggests a gift, Choice C suggests allocation, and Choice D suggests the damage was hidden from the censors. The remaining choice means brought about by. The answer is B.
